comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Findings: strongest shared bottlenecks appear to be token-level mean pooling of all MiniGrid cells plus a lightly weighted direction token, actor/value heads consuming only pooled features, and no cross-token mixing at all in single_expert/SARE beyond pooling.
